subtasks.description: Query Q4 2024 actual spend and 90-day usage trend by product line from consumption_facts table
Query current contracted Adobe licenses by product line from sam_licenses table

Reconcile current contracted state (sam_licenses) with Q4 spend and usage trends (consumption_facts), calculate renewal trajectory per product line, and generate expand/hold/reduce recommendations with posture classification

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks with minimal redundancy: (1) spend/usage aggregation is a mid-tier SQL with joins across consumption_facts and date filtering; (2) license query is small-tier as it's a straightforward single-table lookup; (3) cross_recon (frontier) reconciles contracted vs. actual consumption, calculates trajectory vectors, and generates multi-signal expansion/contraction posture recommendations across product lines—this requires comparative analysis, trend inference, and business judgment that justifies frontier-tier reasoning.

output.sql: WITH q4_spend AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS q4_2024_spend, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS q4_2024_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product), trend_90d AS (SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS spend_90d, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_seats_90d, COUNT(DISTINCT event_date) AS active_days FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY product) SELECT COALESCE(q.product, t.product) AS product, q.q4_2024_spend, q.q4_2024_seats, t.spend_90d, t.avg_daily_seats_90d, t.active_days FROM q4_spend q FULL OUTER JOIN trend_90d t ON q.product = t.product ORDER BY q.q4_2024_spend DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) AS q4_2024_spend, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY product ORDER BY q4_2024_spend DESC

output.note: No MongoDB sam_licenses output was provided in upstream_outputs; only SQL consumption_facts queries are present. Cannot perform LEFT JOIN reconciliation without primary MongoDB entity list.
